applied_terms: Translate 'elephant in the room' idiomatically (e.g., 显而易见却被刻意回避的重大隐患 or 房间里的大象).
Translate 'token diversification' accurately to reflect its superficial nature (e.g., 象征性的多元化 or 点缀式的风险分散).
Maintain a neutral, objective tone regarding geopolitical risks.

understanding.role_in_article: Assesses the geopolitical vulnerability of the Apple-TSMC alliance and evaluates the efficacy of mitigation efforts like the Arizona fab.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Takes the localized manufacturing footprint established in the previous section and evaluates it on a global, geopolitical scale.
understanding.relation_to_next: Contrasts Apple's lack of control over geographic manufacturing risks with its absolute control over silicon IP, setting up the 'Transformational Chip Acquisitions' section.
key_points: Apple has extreme geographic concentration risk, with nearly all leading-edge production located 100 miles from mainland China.
TSMC Arizona currently represents 'token diversification' (<5% capacity).
A shift to 10-15% capacity in Arizona by 2028 would be the true indicator of Apple's geopolitical anxiety.
translation_notes: Translate 'elephant in the room' idiomatically (e.g., 显而易见却被刻意回避的重大隐患 or 房间里的大象).
Translate 'token diversification' accurately to reflect its superficial nature (e.g., 象征性的多元化 or 点缀式的风险分散).
Maintain a neutral, objective tone regarding geopolitical risks.

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少标准空格（CJK-Latin spacing 规范）。译文中的“A系列”与“M系列”英文字母与中文字符紧贴在一起。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s Taiwan concentration is the elephant in the room. Nearly all of Apple’s chip production, including every leading-edge A-series and M-series chip, happens on a single island 100 miles from mainland China.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s Taiwan concentration is the elephant in the room. Nearly all of Apple’s chip production, including every leading-edge A-series and M-series chip, happens on a single island 100 miles from mainland China.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s Taiwan concentration is the elephant in the room. Nearly all of Apple’s chip production, including every leading-edge A-series and M-series chip, happens on a single island 100 miles from mainland China.

pro.text: 苹果在台湾地区的产能高度集中，是一个显而易见却避而不谈的隐患。苹果几乎所有的芯片制造业务，包括每一颗采用先进制程的 A系列与 M系列芯片，均集中在距离中国大陆仅 100 英里的单一岛屿上。

applied_terms: Translate 'elephant in the room' idiomatically (e.g., 显而易见却被刻意回避的重大隐患 or 房间里的大象).
Translate 'token diversification' accurately to reflect its superficial nature (e.g., 象征性的多元化 or 点缀式的风险分散).
Maintain a neutral, objective tone regarding geopolitical risks.

understanding.relation_to_previous: Takes the localized manufacturing footprint established in the previous section and evaluates it on a global, geopolitical scale.
understanding.relation_to_next: Contrasts Apple's lack of control over geographic manufacturing risks with its absolute control over silicon IP, setting up the 'Transformational Chip Acquisitions' section.

TSMC Arizona currently represents 'token diversification' (<5% capacity).
A shift to 10-15% capacity in Arizona by 2028 would be the true indicator of Apple's geopolitical anxiety.

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少标准空格（CJK-Latin spacing 规范）。译文中的“A系列”与“M系列”英文字母与中文字符紧贴在一起。

paragraphs.source: TSMC Arizona provides token diversification, but at current ramp rates, it won’t materially reduce Taiwan dependence until 2028+. Currently <5% of leading-edge production is from Arizona. If this rises to 10-15% by 2028, it signals Apple is genuinely worried about Taiwan.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC Arizona provides token diversification, but at current ramp rates, it won’t materially reduce Taiwan dependence until 2028+. Currently <5% of leading-edge production is from Arizona. If this rises to 10-15% by 2028, it signals Apple is genuinely worried about Taiwan.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC Arizona provides token diversification, but at current ramp rates, it won’t materially reduce Taiwan dependence until 2028+. Currently <5% of leading-edge production is from Arizona. If this rises to 10-15% by 2028, it signals Apple is genuinely worried about Taiwan.

pro.text: 台积电亚利桑那州工厂仅能提供象征性的多元化，但按照目前的产能爬坡速度，至少要到 2028 年之后，才能实质性降低对台湾地区的依赖。目前，产自亚利桑那州的先进制程产能占比不足 5%。如果到 2028 年该比例升至 10% 至 15%，则表明苹果确实对台湾地区的风险感到担忧。
